signals.headline: Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aimed at reducing Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a governance vote securing 98.27% support, positioning Solana as a top execution layer and potentially driving price recovery amid its hover near $80 after a 70% peak decline[5].
